title: Emir's methanol fixation IF protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dsb9b","text":"Methanol fixation protocol for immunofluorescence, should hopefully work for Claudin-5 staining.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"43s3l","text":"Methanol is a toxic substance, work under the hood at all times!","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":64}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Bring methanol to -20C and prepare compartment in cell culture freezer to quickly transfer slides/dishes. Get a box of ice -20 °C Methanol P212121 Catalog #PA-33900HPLCCS4L
Incubate sample in methanol for 12 minutes.
Wash samples with PBS 3 times on ice
Incubate samples with PBS on ice for 5 minutes, repeat 3 times
Store samples in the fridge until further use 4 °C
Block for 1hr in 5% normal goat serum diluted in PBS
Incubate primary antibody diluted in blocking buffer overnight at 4C.
Incubate samples with PBS for 5 minutes, repeat 3 times
Incubate with secondary antibody diluted to 1:1000 in blocking buffer for 2h
Make primary antibody mix for the next step in the meantime
Incubate samples with PBS for 5 minutes, repeat 3 times
Add 1:100 DAPI diluted in PBS, incubate for 10 minutes
Add mounting media, probably PBS in this case or mowiol mixed with 10% dabco
creator: Emir Bora Akmeriç
